title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Cisco India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Cisco India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Cisco India South Asia Partners in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cisco India South Asia Partners:
Cisco India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cisco India South Asia Partners!
